mapper.select: SELECT COLUMN_NAME AS field, COLUMN_TYPE AS type, DATA_TYPE AS dataType, CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH AS length, NUMERIC_PRECISION AS `precision`, NUMERIC_SCALE AS scale, IS_NULLABLE AS nullable, COLUMN_DEFAULT AS defaultValue, COLUMN_KEY AS `key`, EXTRA AS extra, COLUMN_COMMENT AS comment FROM information_schema.columns WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = (select database()) AND TABLE_NAME = #{tableName} ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION
SELECT TABLE_COMMENT FROM information_schema.tables WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = (select database()) AND TABLE_NAME = #{tableName}
